sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Current state ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N', 'M'):
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if min(rows) < 50:
            center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
            center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
            print(f"Color={node['color']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, center=({center_r},{center_c})")

# Check which square the trail touches
# Trail is at player's row, extending right
player_rows = None
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'M' and min([p[0] for p in node['boundary']]) < 50:
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        if node['pixels'] >= 16:  # Main player square
            player_rows = (min(rows), max(rows))
            print(f"\nPlayer at rows {player_rows}")

# Trail is at player's center rows
if player_rows:
    trail_row = (player_rows[0] + player_rows[1]) // 2
    print(f"Trail at row ~{trail_row}")
    for node in seg['nodes']:
        if node['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N'):
            b = node['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            if min(rows) <= trail_row <= max(rows):
                print(f"Trail touches {node['color']} at rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
